hero.art_prompt: Sanjay, a 29 year old Indian man in business-casual, confident, reviewing a clean process board in a modern facility, capable and aspirational.

panels.narration: Sanjay was already good at making processes efficient at work.
panels.dialogue: I always spotted what to improve.
panels.img_prompt: Sanjay, 29, confidently improving a workflow on a clean process board, sharp and focused, modern facility.

panels.narration: But the next step needed an MBA he did not have.
panels.img_prompt: Sanjay looking thoughtful, wondering how to move from executing to leading operations, laptop open, tidy office.

panels.narration: Then he found an online MBA in Operations Management.
panels.dialogue: I can grow without quitting my job!
panels.img_prompt: Sanjay's face lighting up at a laptop showing an online MBA in Operations Management, warm hopeful glow.

panels.narration: Sanjay enrolled and began leading with confidence.
panels.img_prompt: Sanjay confidently starting his first operations strategy lesson on a laptop, notebook ready, focused and happy, warm light.

turn.title: Why An MBA In Operations Management
points: Master the real craft: operations strategy, lean and six sigma, quality and process optimisation.
Apply real AI tools for business from your very first semester.
₹2,00,000 for the full 2-year MBA (₹50,000/semester), with 0% interest EMI or a discount on upfront payment.
A UGC-entitled, NAAC A++ online MBA employers and promotions recognise.
